A moment worth

Nazeeha — Eighteen & radiant 🌸

"

Some feelings don't need to be returned to be real.
Watching you turn eighteen — quietly, from a distance —
is enough of a gift in itself.

You deserve every beautiful thing this world holds.
Every laugh, every dream, every door that opens.
Happy birthday, Nazeeha.

— Lovingly, Feras 🤍

Birthday wishes

Everything she deserves

🌙

A life full of wonder

May every morning bring you something worth waking up for — curiosity, beauty, and the kind of peace that settles deep.

✨

Love that finds you

May the love you give so freely find its way back to you — in people, in moments, in the quiet certainty that you are enough.

🌿

Dreams that grow

Eighteen is just the beginning. May your path unfold in ways that surprise even you, and may you always have the courage to follow it.

✦ From Feras ✦

I love you in
every Universe

In every timeline, every lifetime, every world that ever was —
it has always been you, Nazeeha.

Happy Birthday, Nazeeha

Lovingly yours, Feras
